name: Encore Profile Pro Color
comment: The Encore Profile Pro Color Ellipsoidal features a 250W RGBWAL (Red, Green, Blue, White, Amber, Lime) LED engine. With the lime-infused LED, this fixture produces a hugh gamut of colors with a high CRI, plus it has tunable white color temperature control from 2400K to 9000K. A variety of high definition lens are available to customize output and create precision designed optics that deliver excellent sharpness and an even field of light.

capabilities.comment: Random Strobe Effect Slow to Fast
